narrative:
Precinct Pulaski South (precinct in Williams County) has 528 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.5 percentage points.
